title: NEXTAUTH_URL misconfiguration signal exists (undelivered)
description: Signal signal-migrated-db317a893d7a documents a critical auth misconfiguration: NEXTAUTH_URL must be the base domain only (e.g., https://www.wheelwright.ai), not the full callback path. Setting the full path breaks all OAuth flows. This signal has impact=8 and is currently in HOLD-PENDING triage status.
recommendation: Promote signal-migrated-db317a893d7a from HOLD-PENDING to APPROVED and create an implementation lug to verify and document current NEXTAUTH_URL configuration across all environments (local, staging, production).

title: .env.dev lacks ZAI_API_KEY documentation for safe credential handoff
description: .env.dev contains a commented placeholder for ZAI_API_KEY with guidance to add it manually. While this prevents committed secrets, the pattern could be clearer about when/how to obtain the key and where to document its usage scope.
recommendation: Consider adding a SECRETS.md or ENV_SETUP.md with explicit guidance on obtaining API credentials and their scope (e.g., which external services, access levels).

title: No dependency vulnerability scanning available (no package.json)
description: The tracks spoke contains no package.json file. Auth-adjacent dependencies (next-auth, jose, bcrypt) cannot be scanned for known CVEs. This may be intentional if tracks is not a Node.js application.
recommendation: If tracks is expected to have Node.js dependencies, provide or link to the package.json. If not, document the application type and tech stack for future security scans.

title: No compliance-tagged lugs found in current indexing
description: No open lugs currently tagged with compliance keywords (GDPR, PII, token storage, logging of sensitive fields). This may indicate: (1) compliance work is not yet tracked in lugs, or (2) compliance risk is minimal for this spoke. Recommend establishing a compliance tagging standard.
recommendation: Define a compliance tagging schema (e.g., lug.tags=['GDPR', 'PII']) or establish a compliance-lug type for future tracking. Update this advisor's feeds.yaml to monitor compliance keywords when defined.
